center.name: Paul Gervais
center.summary: Paul Gervais是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Malagasy kingfisher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: vintsioides, Parc de Tsarasotra | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Corythornis | species = vintsioides | authority = (Eydoux & Gervais, 1836) | synonyms = *Alcedo vintsioides | synonyms_ref = }} The Malagasy kingfisher or Madagascar kingfisher (Corythornis vintsioides) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae that is found in Madagascar, Mayotte and the Comoros
